sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports a non-healing foot ulcer. The patient reports pain in their foot. The patient reports an ulcer. The patient's ulcer has been present for approximately one year.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal. An ankle brachial index will be ordered.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a diabetic foot ulcer. The patient has diabetes mellitus.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor will order a surgical shoe. The doctor wants you to wear a surgical shoe. The doctor does not want you to put much pressure on the area. The doctor will schedule a follow-up appointment in two weeks. The doctor will prescribe colagenase ointment.
